justification: As Monsun's GM, A delivers the more complete operator brief. Coverage: A spans market churn, event traffic, internal review health, digital marketing, delivery economics, and direct-compset positioning; B drops the review/operational lens entirely and scans an Asian-cuisine peer set (HAOS, NARA, Chinese Wok) less relevant to a Świętojańska street-level operator than A's actual neighbors (Mąka i Kawa, FLOW, Wymówka, Santorini, Gdynianka). Specificity: A cites 4.36 recent rating, 16% kitchen-complaint rate, 6% owner-reply rate, 100 PLN/m² rent benchmark, plus the damning 41-minute-wait owner quote; B's logistics dates are sharp but its competitive numbers are thinner. Source diversity: A pulls 22 domains across delivery, real estate, press, community, government; B has 12. Actionability ties — B's dated delivery-blackout list is sharp, A's outdoor-stall and tone-correction calls cover more ground. B wins specialist correctness (exact expected set), but A's review_analyst add earned its keep by surfacing operational liabilities B never sees.
